features: SUPER MICRO CUT HIGH SECURITY LEVEL P-5 paper shredder to secure confidential information. The paper slot blade shreds max 10-sheet paper or a credit card into particles measuring 2 mm x 12 mm; The CD slot blade cut one CD or a credit card into 3 strip pieces
CONTINUOUS RUNNING TIME UPTO 60 MINUTES shredder for home office which is supported by patented cooling system
LOW NOISE LEVEL 54dB ultra quiet heavy duty shredder has 22 Litre pull-out waste bin with large transparent window
SUPER ALLOY STEEL CUTTER shreds through staples, paper, clips,credit cards and junk mails at ease
UKCA Certified product and Manufacture's 1-Year limited warranty protects your interests.
description: Product Description SCOPE OF APPLICATION OFFICE / SOHO / SMALL BUSINESS / HOME High-speed operation shreds paper at 2m per minute while running at a low noise level of just 54 dB for a smooth, ultra-quiet shredding experience. Jam reverse system automatically detects paper overloads and allows manual reverses to clear jams. Super alloy steel cutter with copper-based self-lubricating bearing and 40Cr steel gear wheel for superior hardness, extraordinary wear resistance, and the power to shred paper clips, staples, and credit cards. High-security, super micro-cut design shreds up to 10 sheets at once into tiny 2 x 12 mm pieces. Security level of P5, ideal for destroying identifying information and confidential documents. Power: 220V~240V Sheet Capacity: 10 Sheets Cut Size: 2mm x 12mm Shred Speed: 2m/min Max Continuous Working Time: 60 min Waste Bin Capacity: 22L Feed Entrance Width：220mm Product Dimension: 350 x 253 x 550mm Product Weight: 12.2kg Features a separated mechanical structure sheet guider, continuous running time for up to 60minutes, and overheating protection with auto shut-off to prolong the shredder's lifespan. Please refer to the instructional video and user manual before use.
